description: The analyst links their own earlier status first (a cross-reference: 'Previous geolocation here'), then a profile link, then the third-party status that is the actual footage. The own-status link shares the OP's handle, so resolve.py's own-handle skip demotes it; the profile link is not footage either (host "other"); that leaves exactly one footage candidate, the third-party status, which wins the source slot with no date and no source media (declared, not chased). The OP photo stays proof.
title: Geolocated comms tower
